content.text:
<user_query>

Explore the top-level directory structure at /Users/HanHu to understand the workspace layout. Look for:
1. List all directories in /Users/HanHu/ (non-hidden and key hidden ones)
2. Any project directories that might contain ML training code
3. Look for directories like "motion_rl", "isaacgym", "projects", "workspace", "repos", etc.
4. Check for any docker-compose files or Dockerfiles
5. Look for any remote connection configs (SSH configs, etc.)

Provide a clear map of the workspace structure with emphasis on ML/training related directories.
</user_query>

Here‚Äôs a concise map of your workspace at `/Users/HanHu`:

---

## Workspace structure at `/Users/HanHu`

### 1. Top-level directories

**Non-hidden:**
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `Applications` | macOS apps |
| `Desktop` | Desktop files |
| `Documents` | Markdown, NoMachine, script |
| `Downloads` | Downloads |
| `Library` | macOS app data |
| `Movies`, `Music`, `Pictures`, `Public` | Media |
| `Notes` | Notes |
| `Sites` | Web projects |
| `bin` | User binaries |
| `software` | Main software projects (see below) |
| `sync` | Synced content (markdown, notes, notes-sync-service) |

**Hidden:**
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `.cursor` | Cursor IDE config, extensions, projects |
| `.config` | App configs |
| `.hammerspoon` | Hammerspoon automation |
| `.local` | Local data (e.g. `motion-rl-tracker`) |
| `.matplotlib` | Matplotlib config |
| `.nx` | NoMachine |
| `.ssh` | SSH keys and config |
| `.qt` | Qt config |
| `.bytertc` | ByteRTC |

**Top-level file:**
- `isaacgym-motion_rl.code-workspace` ‚Äì VS Code/Cursor workspace for motion_rl over SSH

---

### 2. ML / training-related directories

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl`** | Main motion RL repo (Isaac Gym + humanoid/legged gym) |
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/humanoid-gym`** | Humanoid RL (Isaac Gym + humanoid_gym), training scripts, envs |
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/legged_gym_ws`** | Legged RL (Isaac Gym + legged_gym) |
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/isaacsim_ws`** | Isaac Sim workspace |
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/docker/isaacgym`** | Isaac Gym Docker setup |
| **`/Users/HanHu/software/policy-lineage-tracker`** | RL policy lineage tracker (tasks, mutations, runs) |
| **`/Users/HanHu/.local/share/motion-rl-tracker`** | Policy lineage tracker data |

**Training entry points:**
- `software/motion_rl/humanoid-gym/train.sh` ‚Äì runs `humanoid/scripts/train.py`
- `software/motion_rl/humanoid-gym/humanoid/scripts/train.py` ‚Äì main training script

---

### 3. Project directories

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `software/motion_rl` | Motion RL (Isaac Gym) |
| `software/policy-lineage-tracker` | Policy lineage tracking |
| `sync/notes` | Synced notes |
| `sync/notes-sync-service` | Notes sync service |
| `Documents/Markdown` | Markdown docs |
| `Documents/script` | Scripts |

---

### 4. Docker

**No `docker-compose` files** in the workspace.

**Dockerfiles:**
| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `software/motion_rl/docker/isaacgym/Dockerfile` | Isaac Gym container |
| `software/motion_rl/docker/isaacgym/fuyao.Dockerfile` | Fuyao variant |
| `software/motion_rl/docker/isaacsim/Dockerfile` | Isaac Sim container |
| `software/motion_rl/docker/vscode-extensions/Dockerfile` | VSCode extensions container |

**Build:**
- `software/motion_rl/docker/build.sh` ‚Äì build and push images
- `software/motion_rl/docker/select_container.sh` ‚Äì choose which container to use

---

### 5. Remote / SSH config

**`~/.ssh/config` hosts:**

| Host | Target | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| `huh.desktop.us` | `10.160.64.142` | User `huh`, key `id_ed25519_github` |
| `isaacgym` | `10.160.64.142:22022` | Same host, port 22022, via `ensure-isaacgym-ssh.sh` proxy |
| `user-ssh-fuyao-sh-n2.xiaopeng.link` | Port 2222 | Root, key `id_ed25519` |
| `remote.kernel.fuyo` | Bifrost cluster | Via ProxyJump to Fuyao |
| `gitlab-adc.xiaopeng.link` | GitLab | Git over SSH |

**Workspace remote:**
- `isaacgym-motion_rl.code-workspace` opens `vscode-remote://ssh-remote+isaacgym/huh/software/motion_rl`
- So motion_rl is edited over SSH on `10.160.64.142` (user `huh`), not directly on the Mac

---

### Summary diagram

```
/Users/HanHu
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ software/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ motion_rl/              ‚Üê Main ML/training repo
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ humanoid-gym/       ‚Üê Humanoid RL (train.sh, train.py)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ legged_gym_ws/      ‚Üê Legged RL
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ isaacsim_ws/        ‚Üê Isaac Sim
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ docker/             ‚Üê Dockerfiles (isaacgym, isaacsim, vscode-extensions)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ scripts/, tools/, resources/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ repo_deps/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ policy-lineage-tracker/ ‚Üê RL experiment lineage
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sync/notes, notes-sync-service
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Documents/Markdown, script
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .ssh/config                 ‚Üê Remote hosts (isaacgym, huh.desktop.us, Fuyao, GitLab)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .local/share/motion-rl-tracker
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ isaacgym-motion_rl.code-workspace  ‚Üê Opens motion_rl via SSH (isaacgym host)
```
